description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical vase with a subtly tapered base and a smooth, continuous surface. The material appears to be a light-colored, semi-translucent stone, possibly alabaster or marble, giving it a refined and elegant appearance. The vase has a single, small protruding nub or handle-like feature on one side, which adds a slight asymmetry to its otherwise simple form. The surface is matte with faint, natural-looking striations and color variations, enhancing its organic aesthetic. The opening at the top is wide and circular, suitable for holding floral arrangements or decorative branches. There are no visible decorative motifs or embellishments, emphasizing a minimalist and modern design.
description: A tall, cylindrical, light stone vase with a smooth matte finish and a small side nub, featuring a minimalist and modern design.
description_view_0: The vase is seen from an angle highlighting the small side nub, with the smooth cylindrical body and wide opening visible.
description_view_1: This view shows the vase from the opposite side of the nub, presenting a clean, uninterrupted cylindrical surface.
description_view_2: The vase is rotated to display the nub on the right, with the body’s subtle striations and matte finish visible.
description_view_3: The vase is viewed directly opposite the nub, showing a smooth, featureless surface and the circular opening.
